h1.visual_description: Large, dark blue sans-serif font, left-aligned, enclosed within a light blue rectangular border. Used for major section titles.

h2.visual_description: Bolded sans-serif text at the start of a paragraph, acting as a run-in heading, followed by a period.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption, typically bolded label followed by descriptive text in a smaller sans-serif font.
Page number located at the bottom right corner of the page.
Internal cross-reference to other document sections.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page numbers at the bottom right; section header boxes at the top of new sections.
